title: Nvidia's Generative AI To Fuel Hyper-Scalable 3D Rendering For L'Oréal
description: L’Oréal Groupe announced on Wednesday that it has partnered with Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ:NVDA) to unlock AI’s potential in multiple aspects of beauty. Through this collaboration, L’Oréal and its partner ecosystem will leverage the Nvidia AI Enterprise platform for rapid development and deployment of AI, like scaling 3D digital rendering of L’Oréal products, for a fusion of physical AI and generative AI, expanding creative possibilities.
